payload.label: refrigerator
payload.long_description: Front-facing stainless steel side-by-side refrigerator with two vertical doors, black vertical handles and a built-in water/ice dispenser on the left door; reflective finish shows horizontal reflection bands and minor surface irregularities, with slight edge cropping at the top/right — estimated distance about 1.5 m from the camera.
